name: Zero Risk — FLAGSHIP: SEO Rank-to-#1 (Single-Prompt Engagement)

meta.description: End-to-end SEO engagement from a single webhook POST. 6 parallel sub-workflows feeding 5 Claude sub-agents (Competitive Intel, Content Strategy, Technical SEO, GEO Optimization, Backlink Acquisition) synthesized by an Opus orchestrator into a complete ranking playbook. Covers E-E-A-T, topical authority, semantic SEO, Core Web Vitals, schema automation, AI Overview / GEO optimization, backlink prospecting, and 30-day rank tracking.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_id": "{{ $node['Validate & Normalize'].json.client_id }}",
  "domain": "{{ $node['Validate & Normalize'].json.domain }}",
  "keywords": {{ JSON.stringify([$node['Validate & Normalize'].json.target_keyword, ...$node['Validate & Normalize'].json.secondary_keywords]) }},
  "locale": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Validate & Normalize'].json.locale) }},
  "duration_days": {{ $node['Validate & Normalize'].json.tracking_duration_days }},
  "frequency": "daily",
  "track_serp_features": ["featured_snippet", "ai_overview", "people_also_ask", "local_pack", "image_pack", "video_carousel"]
}
